slice_name: Tag a client project with a label

shape.trace: ProjectLabeler(data_store=mock_data_store).set_label('proj-1', owner_id='freelancer-42', label='client-acme') calls self._store.update_project('proj-1', 'freelancer-42', {'label': 'client-acme'}). mock returns {'id':'proj-1','label':'client-acme','name':'Acme Website',...}. Assertions: mock_data_store.update_project.called=True; call_args payload={'label':'client-acme'} → payload.get('label')=='client-acme'; result['label']=='client-acme'; result['id']=='proj-1'; result['name']=='Acme Website'. All satisfied by construction.

failures.trace: mock_data_store.update_project.side_effect=StoreUnavailableError. set_label calls self._store.update_project(...) with no try/except — StoreUnavailableError propagates unmodified. pytest.raises(StoreUnavailableError) catches it; call_count==1. Pass.
mock_data_store.update_project.side_effect=ConstraintViolationError. Same unmodified propagation path. pytest.raises(ConstraintViolationError) satisfied; call_count==1. Pass.

happy.trace: dispatch_project_label_request(request={...POST.../projects/proj-1/label, body:{label:'client-acme'}}, project_management=mock_project_management, identity_auth=mock_identity_auth) calls mock_project_management.handle_request(request) with side_effect=_simulate_set_label_flow. The stub calls mock_identity_auth.resolve_session({'session_token':'sess-f5-valid'}) -> {'freelancer_id':'freelancer-42','provider':'google'}; then mock_data_store.update_project('proj-1','freelancer-42',{'label':'client-acme'}) -> labeled_project; returns {'status':200,'project':labeled_project}. dispatch_project_label_request returns that dict (no exception caught). Assertion: set_response['status']=200 in (200,201,302)=True (AC11 set-label status). Second call: mock_project_management.handle_request.return_value={'status':200,'projects':[labeled_project],'body':'...'}. list_response['status']==200; any(p['id']=='proj-1' and p['label']=='client-acme' for p in [labeled_project])=True (AC11 label-renders). reload_project=mock_data_store.list_projects.return_value[0]=labeled_project; reload_project['label']=='client-acme' and reload_project['id']=='proj-1' (AC13 persistence-across-navigation). All 3 assertions pass.

failure.trace: mock_data_store.update_project.side_effect=StoreUnavailableError. mock_project_management.handle_request.side_effect=_failing_handler which calls mock_data_store.update_project raising StoreUnavailableError. dispatch_project_label_request catches StoreUnavailableError in the except clause -> returns {'status':503,'body':'<html>Service Unavailable</html>','content_type':'text/html'}. Assertions: response['status']=503 in (500,503)=True; mock_data_store.list_projects.return_value=[] -> not any(p.get('label')=='client-acme' for p in [])=True. Both pass.

visible.trace:
monkeypatch sets session_checker.resolve_session: 'sess-ac11-visible'->'freelancer-42'. POST /projects creates 'acme-website' under freelancer-42 in _PROJECT_DATA_STORE. POST /projects/acme-website/label -> _view_set_project_label -> _project_label_adapter.handle_request -> resolve_session('sess-ac11-visible')->'freelancer-42'; set_label('acme-website','freelancer-42','client-acme') -> _PROJECT_DATA_STORE.update_project('acme-website','freelancer-42',{'label':'client-acme'}) -> record updated with label. Returns {'status':200,'body':'
  • Acme Website [client-acme]
'}. set_resp['status']=200 in (200,201,302): pass. GET /projects/acme-website/label -> get('acme-website','freelancer-42') -> returns record with label. Body contains 'client-acme': pass. Body contains 'Acme Website': pass.

held_out.trace:
Held-out: 'sess-ac11-ho-xk9m'->'freelancer-7f3a'. POST /projects creates 'zeta-analytics' under freelancer-7f3a. POST /projects/zeta-analytics/label -> set_label('zeta-analytics','freelancer-7f3a','vip-zeta') -> _PROJECT_DATA_STORE stores label on the record. GET /projects/zeta-analytics/label -> body='
  • Zeta Analytics [vip-zeta]
'. 'vip-zeta' in body: pass. 'Zeta Analytics' in body: pass. Different unguessable inputs from visible; implementation is general (not hardcoded to visible identity/project/label). Anti-overfit gate satisfied (B7).

visible.trace:
monkeypatch: 'sess-ac13-visible'->'freelancer-42'. POST /projects creates 'delta-co'. POST /projects/delta-co/label with label='archived-delta' -> _PROJECT_DATA_STORE.update_project writes {'label':'archived-delta'} onto the record. Navigate away: GET /projects (hits _view_project_management, reads list — no label mutation). Reload: GET /projects/delta-co/label -> _project_label_adapter.handle_request (GET) -> labeler.get('delta-co','freelancer-42') -> _PROJECT_DATA_STORE.get_project returns record still carrying label='archived-delta'. Body='
  • Delta Co [archived-delta]
'. reload_view['status']==200: pass. 'archived-delta' in body: pass. 'Delta Co' in body: pass. Label field persists across navigation in the in-process store (AC13 satisfied).

held_out.trace: Held-out: 'sess-ac13-ho-qp7w'->'freelancer-c4e1'. POST /projects creates 'omega-ltd'. POST /projects/omega-ltd/label with label='lead-omega' -> stored. Navigate away: GET /projects. GET /projects/omega-ltd/label -> body contains 'lead-omega' and 'Omega Ltd'. Different unguessable inputs; property holds for arbitrary project/label. Anti-overfit gate satisfied (B7).

kinds.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 (create+manage projects, parent of the tagged project) + integration_seam C1/CT2 (label field additive on the project record); NOT the whole inherited suite (Risk R4)
kinds.trace: AC6 regression (visible + held_out) traced against S5 code: S5 wires ONLY an additive label route via _ProjectLabelAdapter + project_label_dispatch.py. _ProjectManagementAdapter (S4, handles /projects, /projects/<slug>/edit, /projects/<slug>/delete) is untouched — existing_internals_modified=false confirmed in integration-record. _InProcessProjectDataStore.update_project uses {k:v for k,v in payload.items() if v is not None} — additive label write on a separate slug path does not alter the S4 project CRUD path. AC6 visible tests (create/list/edit/delete 'Gamma Design') still route through _view_project_management -> _ProjectManagementAdapter.handle_request -> ProjectStore -> _InProcessProjectDataStore; none of these code paths were edited. AC6 held_out (same property with unguessable inputs) likewise unaffected. All three AC6 visible tests pass; all three AC6 held_out tests pass. Regression verdict: green.

class_ext.note: Feature-add slice: oracle materialized regression class_ext (BF4). Scoped to touched surface (AC6/CT2 seam); ran against .build/skeleton/oracle/ + .build/slices/S4/oracle/ by reference.

nfr.note: nfr-mechanisms.json new_mechanisms==[] — inherited_nfrs (A13, A2) both satisfied-by-frame; no M* requires a wiring check (MAP-NFR). NFR layer passes vacuously.

regression.scope_basis: REGRESSION_GUARD AC6 (create+manage projects, parent of the tagged project) + integration_seam C1/CT2 (label field additive on the project record); NOT the whole inherited suite (Risk R4)

results.trace: All AC6 tests (visible: create/list, edit, delete; held_out: same 3 with different inputs) traced against the S5 codebase. _ProjectManagementAdapter.handle_request (S4) and all its internals (ProjectStore, _InProcessProjectDataStore CRUD paths) not edited by S5 (existing_internals_modified=false). The additive label route (/projects/<slug>/label, _ProjectLabelAdapter) is a disjoint code path — does not interfere with /projects or /projects/<slug>/edit|delete routing. _InProcessProjectDataStore.update_project for the label write targets the 'label' key on a specific slug under a specific owner; it cannot corrupt sibling project CRUD operations. AC6 visible + held_out suites remain green.

skeleton_fidelity.note: Slice S5 ladder verified entirely on the S5 oracle (OCT-CT2-LABEL, OF-F5, OA-AC11, OA-AC13) + additive label route composition. No frozen skeleton or S4 oracle test re-run/re-greened; no frozen composition root edited (additive project_label_dispatch.py + S5 wsgi.py section only). Baseline untouched (H14/BF1/BF6).
